input.command: openssl rand -base64 756 | tr -d '\n' | head -c 50; echo; echo "ok"

cd /tmp
openssl rand -base64 756 > /tmp/keyfile.txt
kubectl -n mongodb create secret generic mongodb-keyfile --from-file=keyfile=/tmp/keyfile.txt
kubectl -n mongodb create secret generic admin-user-password --from-literal=password=admin123password
kubectl -n mongodb create secret generic app-user-password --from-literal=password=app123password
echo "secrets done"
kubectl -n mongodb get secret

content.content:
secret/mongodb-keyfile created
secret/admin-user-password created
secret/app-user-password created
secrets done

app-user-password     Opaque   1      1s
mongodb-keyfile       Opaque   1      1s

input.content:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: mongodb-replica-svc
  namespace: mongodb
  labels:
    app: mongodb-replica
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  selector:
    app: mongodb-replica
  ports:
    - name: mongodb
      port: 27017
      targetPort: 27017
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: mongodb-replica
  namespace: mongodb
spec:
  serviceName: mongodb-replica-svc
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mongodb-replica
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: mongodb-replica
    spec:
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 10
      initContainers:
        - name: copy-keyfile
          image: busybox:1.36
          command:
            - sh
            - -c
            - |
              cp /etc/keyfile-src/keyfile /etc/keyfile/keyfile
              chmod 400 /etc/keyfile/keyfile
              chown 999:999 /etc/keyfile/keyfile
          volumeMounts:
            - name: keyfile-src
              mountPath: /etc/keyfile-src
            - name: keyfile
              mountPath: /etc/keyfile
      containers:
        - name: mongod
          image: mongo:7.0
          command:
            - mongod
            - "--replSet"
            - "mongodb-replica"
            - "--bind_ip_all"
            - "--auth"
            - "--keyFile"
            - "/etc/keyfile/keyfile"
          ports:
            - containerPort: 27017
              name: mongodb
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /data/db
            - name: keyfile
              mountPath: /etc/keyfile
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - bash
                - -c
                - "mongosh --quiet --eval 'db.adminCommand({ping:1})'"
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
      volumes:
        - name: keyfile-src
          secret:
            secretName: mongodb-keyfile
            defaultMode: 0400
        - name: keyfile
          emptyDir: {}
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: data
      spec:
        accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 1Gi

content.content: File created successfully at: /tmp/mongo.yaml (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: mongodb-replica-svc
  namespace: mongodb
  labels:
    app: mongodb-replica
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  selector:
    app: mongodb-replica
  ports:
    - name: mongodb
      port: 27017
      targetPort: 27017
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: mongodb-replica
  namespace: mongodb
spec:
  serviceName: mongodb-replica-svc
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mongodb-replica
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: mongodb-replica
    spec:
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 10
      initContainers:
        - name: copy-keyfile
          image: busybox:1.36
          command:
            - sh
            - -c
            - |
              cp /etc/keyfile-src/keyfile /etc/keyfile/keyfile
              chmod 400 /etc/keyfile/keyfile
              chown 999:999 /etc/keyfile/keyfile
          volumeMounts:
            - name: keyfile-src
              mountPath: /etc/keyfile-src
            - name: keyfile
              mountPath: /etc/keyfile
      containers:
        - name: mongod
          image: mongo:7.0
          command:
            - mongod
            - "--replSet"
            - "mongodb-replica"
            - "--bind_ip_all"
            - "--auth"
            - "--keyFile"
            - "/etc/keyfile/keyfile"
          ports:
            - containerPort: 27017
              name: mongodb
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /data/db
            - name: keyfile
              mountPath: /etc/keyfile
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - bash
                - -c
                - "mongosh --quiet --eval 'db.adminCommand({ping:1})'"
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
      volumes:
        - name: keyfile-src
          secret:
            secretName: mongodb-keyfile
            defaultMode: 0400
        - name: keyfile
          emptyDir: {}
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: data
      spec:
        accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 1Gi

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  ready=$(kubectl -n mongodb get statefulset mongodb-replica -o jsonpath='{.status.readyReplicas}' 2>/dev/null)
  echo "attempt $i readyReplicas=$ready"
  if [ "$ready" = "3" ]; then echo "ALL READY"; break; fi
  sleep 10
done
kubectl -n mongodb get pods 2>&1
